bundle_metadata.selection_note: A2 core models use the latest complete 4-runner targeted rerun for this task, not the progressive summary.

tool_calls.purpose: Recover repo_export_inventory and detect existing export_conflict_policy (export.zip)

runner_response_json.user_facing_response: I will start by inventorying the repository structure and checking for the existing .gitignore to understand what is currently excluded. This will help me identify any potential conflicts and distinguish between demo assets and private data before we finalize the export.
runner_response_json.brief_rationale: The grounding guide prioritizes inventorying the repo and inspecting the .gitignore before asking policy questions. This recovers critical recoverable slots (repo structure, existing export, ignore rules) to ground the subsequent policy decisions.

  "concise_rationale": "The assistant correctly chose inspect-first and targeted the repo inventory, existing export conflict, and ignore rules before asking anything. However, it did not separately address secret-bearing filenames, hidden/local config risks, notebooks, or runtime artifacts, so it is not strong and is capped at acceptable."
